goodtransgirl:

I feel her hand slide under my shirt to the small of my back, the electric desire of just this simple touch fills me with anticipation of what’s to come. She guides me in front of a full length mirror. “Take it off, but keep your eyes on the mirror.” she tells me gently into my ear, her warm breath distracting. My hands shake as one by one, I watch myself release each button on the fitted top and moment by moment, more of my torso and breasts gradually come into view. When the last button is freed, I let my top drop to the floor quickly, letting my anticipation get the better of me.

As the top hits the floor, she’s still standing behind me, her right hand softly runs from the small of my back up my spine. When it reaches the base of my neck, and she brings her other hand as well and then they part, each hand running softly down one of my now bare arms, leaving goosebumps in their wake. “Take it slow.” she whispers again, in a slightly reprimanding tone, my eyes enthralled with the mirror, watc
